title: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on
summary: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.

title: Stripe and Swift race to control the next generation of global payments infrastructure
summary: Crypto and blockchain experts say this week's moves show the two established finance companies are increasingly competing for control of the infrastructure behind digital payments.

title: Cardano hands core development to outside teams in decentralization push
summary: Input Output will transfer control of the Haskell node, Plutus, Hydra and other components as founder Charles Hoskinson says the network must change and start growing again.

title: Inside Robinhood’s high-stakes bet to onboard millions of casual users onto decentralized finance
summary: The company says its advantage lies in bringing retail customers onchain, but early activity remains dominated by memecoins, while its original tokenization vision remains small.

title: Japan's SBI Group is building Asia's first cross-border digital asset empire
summary: The securities giant announced today the consolidation of Singapore-based Coinhako as part of a rapid regional expansion that includes a tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance.
